/cm/local/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/gfortran    -ffree-line-length-none -cpp -fallow-argument-mismatch CMakeFiles/quick.dir/main.f90.o  -o quick  -Wl,-rpath,/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir/src:/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir/src/lapack:/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir/src/blas: libquick.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir/src/lapack:/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir/src/blas
